message:
feat(fp-io): SqlInspector wrapper for unified introspection API (br-szs9 / fd90.38)

Add SqlInspector<'a, C: SqlConnection> struct that wraps a
connection reference and exposes the full fd90.20-37 introspection
surface as methods on a single bundle. Mirrors SQLAlchemy.Inspector
shape so callers don't have to remember which list_sql_* / sql_*
free-fn to use.

Methods (pure delegation, no new behavior):
  - tables(schema)
  - views(schema)
  - schemas()
  - columns(table, schema)
  - indexes(table, schema)
  - foreign_keys(table, schema)
  - unique_constraints(table, schema)
  - primary_key_columns(table, schema)
  - table_comment(table, schema)
  - table_exists(table, schema) — routes via table_exists_in_schema
  - server_version()
  - max_identifier_length()
  - dialect_name()

Constructor: SqlInspector::new(&conn). Free-fn alias:
inspect(&conn) — reads more naturally for one-shot use.
Re-exported via the frankenpandas umbrella.

7 new tests cover: tables/views/schemas, columns + PK + indexes
+ FKs on a real SQLite schema, unique_constraints + table_exists,
server_version + dialect_name + max_identifier_length on SQLite,
table_comment returns None on SQLite, inspect() helper round-trip,
multi-schema PG-like stub propagates schema arg through tables /
views / schemas / dialect_name / max_identifier_length.

398 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,11 +67,13 @@ pub use fp_io::{
     SqlIndexSchema,
     SqlInsertMethod,
     SqlIndexedChunkIterator,
+    SqlInspector,
     SqlQueryResult,
     SqlReadOptions,
     SqlTableSchema,
     SqlUniqueConstraintSchema,
     SqlWriteOptions,
+    inspect,
     list_sql_foreign_keys,
     list_sql_indexes,
     list_sql_schemas,
